texto: There is a kind of truth in everything, even fairytales. In fact, especially in fairytales... The King understood it as he looked out from the roof of the Temple and saw the clouds flying past and the green fields far beneath him. He knew that some things are real whether you believe in them or not...(The Thirteenth King)
explicacao: Citação de Elizabeth Hopkinson sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “There is a kind of truth in everything, even fairytales. In fact, especially in fairytales... The…” articula reflexao, belief, fairy-tales em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como fairy-tales e verdade.
